default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX job offer details and address Branko's questions about the role.](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Branko is highly interested in joining GrowthX, seeking clarity on role specifics and compensation structure](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Marcel outlined a flexible approach to Branko's potential responsibilities (80% internal initially, evolving based on needs/preferences)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Compensation structure includes base salary, variable comp (\~20% tied to revenue under management), and company-wide bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Both parties are excited about Branko's potential contributions, including bringing his existing assets/relationships to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Topics

### Role Definition and Career Path

  - [Initially \~80% internal work (training, enablement, processes)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Flexibility to balance client-facing vs. internal/product development work](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Opportunity to manage teams and scale accounts (e.g., 100 accounts) if desired](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Involvement in product development (workflows, Content OS) encouraged](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Compensation Structure

  - [Base salary + variable compensation + company-wide bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Variable comp: \~2% of revenue under management (e.g., $37k/year for 12 clients)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Target: Variable comp to be at least 20% of base salary, with no upper limit](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [Company-wide bonuses tied to ARR milestones (22-23 million ARR by year-end)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Total OTE (On-Target Earnings) projected around $240k annually (pro-rated for 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Bonus and Incentive Details

  - [Sign-on bonus to be discussed (potentially tied to Branko's existing content/relationships)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Regular bonuses paid quarterly for MDs, annually for company-wide](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Incentives focused on client retention, expansion, and sustainable growth](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Specific KPIs and controllable inputs still being defined](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)

### GrowthX Current State and Growth

  - [Recent key hires strengthening the team (e.g., Jacob with G2, ActiveCampaign experience)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Potential high-profile client (Stack Blitz) in discussions](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Rapid hiring and onboarding processes underway](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Product development focusing on workflow automation and Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Logistical Details

  - [Proposed start date: April 14th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Travel expenses for onboarding supported (with reasonable limits)](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Trust-based policies for expenses and time off](https://fathom.video/share/2ZJ6vzWqqs-Mb4bjC3XaoGF6WyHimazP?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
